# Accessor: characterMap

## Get Signature

```ts
get characterMap(): Map<string, TextmodeGlyph>;
```

Character-to-glyph lookup map.

### Returns

`Map`\<`string`, [`TextmodeGlyph`](../../../type-aliases/TextmodeGlyph.md)\>

### Example
